# GitHub Discussions Guide

Welcome to LCARdS Discussions! This is the place for questions, ideas, and community engagement. 🖖

## When to Use Discussions vs Issues

### Use Discussions For:

✅ **Questions** - "How do I configure...?"  
✅ **Help requests** - "I can't figure out..."  
✅ **Ideas** - "What if we could...?"  
✅ **Feature brainstorming** - Early-stage feature discussions  
✅ **Showing off** - Share your awesome LCARS dashboards!  
✅ **Troubleshooting** - Getting help debugging (not confirmed bugs)  
✅ **General chat** - Community conversation about LCARS, Star Trek, etc.  

### Use Issues For:

🐛 **Confirmed bugs** - Something is definitely broken  
✨ **Formal feature requests** - Well-defined feature proposals  
📚 **Documentation issues** - Specific doc improvements needed  
⚡ **Performance problems** - Confirmed performance issues  
📦 **Pack system issues** - Problems with packs  

**Rule of thumb:** If you're not sure, start with Discussions! We can always convert it to an issue if needed.

---

## Discussion Categories

LCARdS Discussions are organized into categories:

### 💡 Ideas

**Purpose:** Feature brainstorming and early-stage suggestions

Use this category to:
- Share ideas for new features or improvements
- Brainstorm solutions to common problems
- Discuss potential new cards or capabilities
- Get feedback on concepts before creating formal feature requests

**Tips:**
- Don't worry about having a complete proposal
- Be open to feedback and iteration
- Check if similar ideas already exist
- Tag with relevant keywords (card names, feature areas)

**Example Topics:**
- "Idea: Animated warp core visualization for MSD"
- "What if buttons could have multiple text layers?"
- "Custom shapes for elbow cards?"

---

### 🙋 Q&A (Questions & Answers)

**Purpose:** Get help and answer questions

Use this category to:
- Ask "how-to" questions
- Get help with configuration
- Troubleshoot issues (before confirming they're bugs)
- Learn about LCARdS features
- Share tips and tricks

**Tips:**
- Search existing Q&A first
- Include your card configuration (remove sensitive data!)
- Mention your LCARdS and Home Assistant versions
- Mark helpful answers with ✓
- Pay it forward - answer questions you know!

**Example Topics:**
- "How do I change button colors based on entity state?"
- "MSD lines not connecting - what am I doing wrong?"
- "Best way to organize a large LCARS dashboard?"
- "Template syntax for conditional text?"

---

### 📢 Show and Tell

**Purpose:** Share your awesome LCARS dashboards and setups!

Use this category to:
- Share screenshots/videos of your dashboards
- Show off creative use of LCARdS
- Inspire others with your designs
- Get feedback on your configurations
- Share interesting card combinations

**Tips:**
- Post screenshots or videos
- Share configs if you're comfortable (remove sensitive data!)
- Tell us about interesting challenges you solved
- Describe your setup (HA version, device, etc.)

**Example Topics:**
- "My LCARS engineering bay dashboard"
- "Enterprise-D bridge recreation"
- "Animated MSD showing whole-home status"
- "Mobile-optimized LCARS panel"

**Inspiration:** This is the fun stuff! Show us what you've built! 🖖

---

### 🎨 Themes & Packs

**Purpose:** Discuss themes and content packs

Use this category to:
- Share custom themes
- Discuss pack creation
- Request pack features
- Share button/component presets
- Collaborate on pack development

**Tips:**
- Share your custom themes and presets
- Discuss pack system improvements
- Coordinate community pack efforts
- Link to external pack resources

**Example Topics:**
- "TNG-era color palette theme"
- "Creating a Voyager-style button pack"
- "Pack system feature requests"
- "Sharing my custom elbow styles"

**Note:** The pack system is still in development, but we're excited to see what the community creates!

---

### 🐛 Troubleshooting

**Purpose:** Get help debugging problems

Use this category to:
- Debug card configuration issues
- Figure out why something isn't working
- Get help with error messages
- Test whether an issue is a bug or user error

**When it's confirmed as a bug, create an issue!**

**Tips:**
- Include full error messages from console
- Share card configurations
- Describe expected vs actual behavior
- Mention what you've already tried
- Be ready to test suggestions

**Example Topics:**
- "Buttons not responding on mobile"
- "Console error: Cannot read property 'state'"
- "Charts not loading data"
- "Editor crashes when opening studio"

**Important:** If troubleshooting confirms a bug, we'll ask you to create a proper [Bug Report issue](https://github.com/snootched/LCARdS/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml).

---

### 📚 Documentation

**Purpose:** Documentation feedback and requests

Use this category to:
- Ask for documentation on specific topics
- Discuss documentation improvements
- Share documentation tips
- Report confusing or missing docs (informal)

**For formal doc issues:** Use the [Documentation issue template](https://github.com/snootched/LCARdS/issues/new?template=documentation.yml)

**Tips:**
- Describe what documentation you need
- Point out confusing sections
- Suggest structure improvements
- Share good examples from other projects

**Example Topics:**
- "Need more examples for rules engine"
- "DataSource documentation is confusing"
- "Can we get a card configuration cheat sheet?"
- "Video tutorials for MSD studio?"

---

## Discussion Etiquette

### Be Respectful
- This is a hobby project - maintainers are volunteering their time
- Be patient waiting for responses
- Be kind to other community members
- Follow the [Code of Conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)

### Be Helpful
- Search before posting - your question might be answered already
- Mark helpful answers with ✓
- Answer questions you know
- Share your solutions when you figure things out
- Update your posts if you solve your own problem

### Be Clear
- Use descriptive titles
- Provide context and details
- Format code properly (use \`\`\` code blocks)
- Remove sensitive information
- Use appropriate categories

### Be Constructive
- Focus on solutions, not complaints
- Provide specific, actionable feedback
- Acknowledge trade-offs and constraints
- Celebrate others' work
- Keep discussions on-topic

---

## Getting Started

### New to LCARdS?

Start here:
1. Read the [README](../README.md)
2. Check the [Getting Started Guide](../doc/user-guide/getting-started/)
3. Browse existing discussions
4. Ask questions in Q&A!

### Want to Contribute?

Check out:
- [Contributing Guide](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [Architecture Documentation](../doc/architecture/)
- [Open Issues](https://github.com/snootched/LCARdS/issues)

### Found a Bug?

1. Search existing [issues](https://github.com/snootched/LCARdS/issues) first
2. Ask in Troubleshooting if unsure
3. Create a [Bug Report](https://github.com/snootched/LCARdS/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml) if confirmed

---

## Pro Tips

### For Faster Answers

✅ **Do:**
- Search existing discussions first
- Provide version information
- Include card configurations
- Share error messages
- Be specific about what's not working

❌ **Don't:**
- Ask the same question multiple times
- Post configs with sensitive data
- Expect immediate responses
- Demand features or fixes
- Post off-topic content

### For Better Feature Ideas

✅ **Do:**
- Describe the problem you're trying to solve
- Provide use cases
- Consider alternatives
- Be open to feedback
- Check if it could be a pack extension

❌ **Don't:**
- Demand specific implementations
- Assume it's easy
- Duplicate existing requests
- Submit overly vague ideas

### For Great Show & Tell Posts

✅ **Do:**
- Post screenshots/videos
- Explain interesting techniques
- Share configs (if comfortable)
- Inspire others
- Respond to questions about your setup

❌ **Don't:**
- Post only config without context
- Include sensitive information
- Self-promote commercial products

---

## Community Guidelines Summary

1. **Be respectful** - Treat others as you want to be treated
2. **Be patient** - This is a hobby project
3. **Be helpful** - Share knowledge and help others
4. **Be constructive** - Focus on solutions
5. **Be on-topic** - Keep discussions relevant
6. **Follow the rules** - Read and follow the Code of Conduct

---

🖖 **Welcome to the LCARdS community! Live long and prosper!**

*Have questions about Discussions? Ask in the Q&A category!*
